repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Presbyterian Church of Corning records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: First Presbyterian Church of Corning (Corning, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Two volumes (1834-1845, 1847-897) session meeting minutes, which deal predominately with discipline, temperance and administrative issues and one volume of trustee's records (1843-1915)

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The church was organized July 1, 1811 in Knoxsville as the Presbyterian Church of Painted Post, and admitted to the Presbytery of Geneva in 1812. The ultimate result of at least two subsequent changes in Presbytery boundaries was the church's membership in the Chemung Presbytery. In 1843, the congregation's name was changed to the present one. Considerable controversy involving a temperance resolution, discussion of church governance, structure and personal differences among the membership resulted in the dismission of forty-six members who organized and built a second church in 1845, again called the Presbyterian Church of Painted Post. The two churches were reunited by act of the Presbytery in 1849, but evidently continued to worship separately. During the winter of 1863-1864 a revival assisted by the Evangelist Rev. O. Parker increased membership and helped finance the construction of a stone church which was completed in 1867.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: No records exist from the church's formation in 1811 until 1834. Items #1 and #2 contain church session meeting minutes (1834-1845; 1847-1897) and item #3 is a trustee's record book (1843-1915). The session records are predominately related to discipline, temperance, and administrative issues. Membership lists appear in items #1 and #3. Microfilm errors are as follows: in item #1 pages 54 and 55 are duplicated between pages 51 and 52; in item #2 pages 14-17 are duplicated between pages 17 and 18; and in item #3 two pages with the heading "Trustees Nov. 9-1901" are repeated. Contents:

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Presbyterian Church of Corning records, #6081. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.corpname: Presbyterian Church of Painted Post (Painted Post, N.Y.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Session Record Book, February 1834 to October 1845 . Session minutes record names of moderator, elders and corresponding members present, appointments to committees, issuance of citations to appear before session (copied in minutes), hearing committee reports, special meetings, granting letters of dismission, admitting new members, baptisms and officiating clergy, hearing confessions and accusations of misconduct, election and installation of elders, passing judgement on accused members including public announcement of guilt, suspension, excommunication, and appointment of delegates to Presbytery meetings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records names, dismission to (?), suspended, excommunicated, died.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records name, when received, how received, when/how dismissed.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records names, when admitted, by letter or examination, dismissed to where, suspended, excommunicated, died, remarks. Note: first four pages have no dates, fifth's dated January 1, 1834.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Session minutes begin. Pagination begins.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Temperance resolution incorporated into Confession of Faith.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Above temperance clause expunged from Confession of Faith on advice of Presbytery.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Session refuses to hold a congregational meeting requested by 14 members re: above temperance clause and increasing number of elders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Presbytery to meet to discuss the above issue.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Member charged with heresy for claiming universal salvation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Anti-slavery resolution adopted; name changed to First Presbyterian Church of Corning.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Member suspended for leaving the church during a sermon given by a black minister.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Presbytery advises Session that suspension for color prejudice is too severe.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy of a letter from clerk of Chemung Presbytery re: recent changes in Corning church governance structure, and notice of Presbytery meeting to be held at Corning to discuss this.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These entries concern the case of one member.. The intensity of this trial leads to a complaint against the Presbytery, and eventually involved the Synod. Note: pagination ends p. 190.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy of a letter to the pastor from approximately 30 members requesting dismission to form own church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes name, when and how received, dismissed, suspended, excommunicated, died. (20 names)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Membership list

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Membership lists,some upside down, many corrections, some dates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy letter (Corning, November 4, 1845) From petitioners for dismission and recommendations, and resolution (Corning, November 1, 1845 to grant dismission to petitioners without recommendation of good Christian character, signed by church pastor.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Session minutes record same information as in item #1 with the addition of deacon's reports.

did.unittitle: Confession of Faith (2 pages) and Covenant (2 pages)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: With membership lists (names, removed, died, dismissed).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes begin. Pagination begins.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Session invites First Presbyterian Church of Painted Post to reunite separated congregations.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolution by Presbytery to reunite Corning and Painted Post churches.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Member excommunicated as result of a case which lasted two years.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Decision re: foreign missions fund.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolution re: dancing.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Female members invited to participate in election of church officers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolution to hold daily prayer meetings and to invite Rev. O. Parker, "The Evangelist," to assist.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes end.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Gives synopsis of church history and lists elders' names, when ordained, installed, ceased to act.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Same page as above. Of First Presbyterian Church of Painted Post, with dates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: For the reunited First Presbyterian Church of Corning, with dates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: re: death of an elder, 1883 .

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists names and dates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes name, date, how received, date died, suspended or excommunicated (paginated).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists names, dates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records whether male, female adult or infant, who performed and when.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Signed by church clerk and pastor.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: re: mission contributions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Of centennial speech delivered July 1876.

did.unittitle: Book of Records of the First Presbyterian Society of Corning,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Trustee's Record Book, 1843-1915. Annual church and congregation meeting minutes record election of trustees, appointment of class leaders, appointments to committees, passage and adoption of resolutions; calling, electing and hiring ministers and sextons; choice of chairperson and clerk; setting pew rents/costs, minister's salary, sexton's salary, subscriptions and collections; hearing annual and incidental trustees' reports, and corporate meetings with statements on church and congregation finances.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records election of trustees, appointment of class leaders. Signed by Steuben County Court Commissioner.

did.unittitle: Certificate verifying election of trustees, ( September 13, 1844 )

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Signed by Steuben County Clerk.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Committee established to plan construction of a session house.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Entries re: building a new church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church debt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Building a parsonage.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church debt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: $9096.00 taken in subscriptions to clear debt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church debt of $5658.13.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: last entry.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Treasurer's reports, 1915-1916; "copy organ subscriptions" (1902?); annual meeting minutes (April 13, 1914) on letter head "The Corning Building Co.;" and notice re: envelope system," November 30, 1896 (see minutes for November 26, 1896). All of these are tipped in notes.
